title: An Act relative to surveillance pricing in grocery stores

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Sabadosa of Northampton, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 99) of Lindsay N. Sabadosa relative to surveillance pricing in grocery stores.  Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity

related_entities.name: committee on Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 04/09/2025 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-1
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
